VROEGZAT.bands: DJ Rob de Nice, MC Rick Rossig (main)
VROEGZAT.summary: A Dutch event bringing nightlife to the early evening with a mix of danceable tunes across genres.

FRANK_BOEIJEN.summary: Dutch singer-songwriter Frank Boeijen returns to his beloved hometown of Nijmegen for an evening of poetic songs and stories.

AND_ALSO_THE_TREES.related_artists: The Cure, Killing Joke, Cocteau Twins, Tindersticks, Nick Cave
AND_ALSO_THE_TREES.summary: The English post-punk band And Also the Trees from Worcestershire performs songs from their new album 'The Devil's Door'.

BERTOLF.related_artists: Buck Meek, Ben Caplan, CCC Inc., Millichamp
BERTOLF.summary: Dutch musician Bertolf presents his bluegrass album 'Bluefinger vol. 2' with his excellent Dutch band.

WYATT_E.summary: Belgian band Wyatt E. performs long, hypnotic, and atmospheric compositions built on heavy, repetitive riffs and deep drones, often based on ancient mythology.

DARYLL_ANN.summary: The Dutch guitar pop band Daryll-Ann performs their cult-classic album 'Daryll-Ann Weeps' in its entirety for the first time.

DAOUD.summary: The French-Moroccan trumpeter and composer daoud plays unconventional, danceable, and cheerful jazz that blends hip-hop grooves, neo-soul, and rock.

KLEZMAGIC.summary: The Amsterdam-based Balkan band Klezmagic presents their new album 'Op Vrije Voeten' in an energetic show blending Balkan, Klezmer, and Ska.

IOS.summary: A Dutch Nederpop band returns with new material and classic hits.

MASTER_BOOT_RECORD.related_artists: Carpenter Brut, Perturbator, Gost, 220 Stab Wounds, Sanguisugabogg
MASTER_BOOT_RECORD.summary: Master Boot Record creates an instrumental retro-futurist soundscape fusing heavy metal, chiptune, and classical, supported by Italian death metal band Fulci and solo Gameboy project Arottenbrit.

ADULT_DVD.summary: A six-piece synthpunk band from the Netherlands returns to Nijmegen with danceable, retro computer game-like music that grooves, rocks, and swings.

Hällas + Earth Tongue.related_artists: Uriah Heep, Wishbone Ash, vroege Genesis
Hällas + Earth Tongue.summary: Hällas, a Swedish band, balances cosmic prog and classic hardrock with 70s-inspired soundscapes and theatrical vocals, supported by New Zealand duo Earth Tongue who inject psychedelic rock with gothic horror.

IDA.summary: Dutch hyperpop sensation IDA performs genre-bending Neder-hype-pop with sharp introspective lyrics and eclectic productions.

FLEMMING.summary: FLEMMING (Flemming Freddie Viguurs) is a Dutch pop artist known for catchy, Nederlandstalige pop with creative productions and witty lyrics.

Ruben Hillen.summary: Ruben Hillen is a Dutch singer-songwriter known from The Voice of Holland, blending pop, soul, and modern singer-songwriter influences.

Racoon.summary: Racoon, a Dutch band from Zeeland, returns to Doornroosje for a concert.

CLOUDSURFERS.summary: Cloudsurfers, a Nijmegen-based five-piece band, present their evolved sound blending garagepunk, post-grunge, and psychedelic rock.

Los Pirañas.summary: Colombian supergroup Los Pirañas blends dance music with traditional styles like cumbia, afrobeat, chicha, and champeta.

DYLAN LEBLANC - solo.summary: American singer-songwriter Dylan LeBlanc, son of Muscle Shoals session musician James LeBlanc, performs a solo set blending sixties folk, soul, altcountry and West Coast pop.

William Barrett Band.summary: The William Barrett Band presents their debut album 'Live in Amsterdam', a live jazz experience recorded in Amsterdam, featuring bassist William Barrett and his band.

Philip Lassiter.summary: Philip Lassiter, an 11-time Grammy-winning trumpeter and arranger from Texas, performs with his full 10-piece band.

Alex Henry Foster.related_artists: Explosions in the Sky, Mogwai, Amplifier, Radiohead, Nick Cave
Alex Henry Foster.summary: Alex Henry Foster is a Canadian singer-songwriter known for intense, cinematic alternative rock and post-rock, blending spoken word, melancholic melodies, and atmospheric soundscapes.

Hippotraktor.related_artists: Gojira, Meshuggah, The Ocean, Psychonaut, Pothamus, MÚR
Hippotraktor.summary: Hippotraktor, a Belgian progressive metal band from Mechelen, combines technical precision with atmospheric sludge and djent influences.

Primitive Ring.related_artists: FUZZ, Ty Segall, GØGGS, Hooveriii, King Gizzard and the Lizard Wizard
Primitive Ring.summary: Los Angeles powertrio Primitive Ring, featuring members of FUZZ and Hooveriii, perform their debut album on their first European tour.

Bokkeryers.related_artists: DeWolff, Ozzy Osbourne, André Rieu, Carnaval Corpse
Bokkeryers.summary: Bokkeryers is a Limburgish-language metal band formed by brothers Pablo and Vince van de Poel of DeWolff, blending doom, sludge, and thrash metal with punk attitude and humor.

corto.alto.summary: corto.alto is a band from Glasgow led by multi-instrumentalist Liam Shortall, blending jazz with hiphop, broken beats, and dub.

Tusky + Rats and Daggers.related_artists: IDLES, Queens of the Stone Age, Amyl & the Sniffers
Tusky + Rats and Daggers.summary: Tusky delivers fast, fierce punkrock with emo-hardcore influences, while Rats and Daggers brings a sharp blend of heavy and punk inspired by IDLES, Queens of the Stone Age, and Amyl & the Sniffers.

HAEVN.summary: Dutch band HAEVN performs a mix of electronic and indiepop with melancholic, cinematic sound.

Thijs Veldhuis.genres: pop, rock, electronic, neo klassiek, indie, singer-songwriter
Thijs Veldhuis.summary: Thijs Veldhuis, a Dutch singer-songwriter from Utrecht who participated in The Voice of Holland, performs his own songs blending rock, indie, pop, classical, and electronic influences.

SNAYX.related_artists: Sleaford Mods, Soft Play, Kind Kapichi, Bob Vylan
SNAYX.summary: British alt-rock trio SNAYX brings their energetic live show with bass-driven anthems blending punk, rock, electronics, and experimental influences.

The Rumjacks.related_artists: Gogol Bordello, Dropkick Murphys, UK Subs, The Pogues, Flogging Molly
The Rumjacks.summary: The Rumjacks, an explosive folk-punk band from Sydney, Australia, known for their raw punk with Celtic influences and sing-along choruses.

Chica Chica.genres: funk, jazz, soul, cumbia, psychedelic rock
Chica Chica.summary: Chica Chica, a Dutch trio, celebrates the release of their second album 'Mi Zafira' with psychedelic cumbia and tropical grooves.

Wodan Boys.summary: Wodan Boys is a Dutch rock band from The Hague known for their energetic punk rock sound.

NAFT.summary: Belgian group NAFT, known for their debut album 'Brass Tactics', blends electronic music with live brass and drums for an energetic rave experience.

STIPPENLIFT.summary: Stippenlift, the Dutch project of Hugo van de Poel, celebrates 15 years of Christmas hits with a special show blending pop, electronic, and depriwave.

THE JAYHAWKS.summary: The Jayhawks, an American band formed in 1985 in Minneapolis, perform their unique mix of country, folk, soul, Britpop, and rock 'n roll.

THE SKINTS.related_artists: The Specials, Madness, Protoje, Jesse Royal
THE SKINTS.summary: The Skints, a Bristol-based quartet, blend reggae, soul, punk, ska, and grime into a unique 'tropical punk' style.

TRAMHAUS.summary: Tramhaus is an energetic five-piece band from Rotterdam, recently signed to Sub Pop Records, known for their explosive live shows and a sound ranging from post-hardcore to shoegaze and punkrock.

PLAYLUNCH.summary: Australian band Playlunch brings their heavy, grunge-infused pop to Europe for the first time.

MÚR.related_artists: Cult of Luna, The Ocean, Messa, Psychonaut
MÚR.summary: Icelandic band MÚR, featuring former members of Sólstafir, performs heavy atmospheric post metal with cinematic dynamics.

LA PEGATINA.genres: punk, latin, mestizo, salsa, rumba, ska
LA PEGATINA.summary: La Pegatina, a Madrid-based band, brings their energetic mix of rumba catalana, ska, punk, cumbia, and música mestiza for a fiesta therapy concert.

FROUKJE - 'KIJK JE NAAR MIJ' ALBUMTOUR 2.summary: Froukje, a Dutch singer-songwriter, performs her new album 'Kijk Je Naar Mij?' following her recent sold-out tour in Belgium.

HENGE.summary: HENGE, an American alien-themed rock act, brings their groovy spacerock with synths and hooks to the stage.

SAM NEWBOULD QUINTET.summary: The Sam Newbould Quintet, a Yorkshire-born, Amsterdam-based heavy metal ensemble, performs music from their Edison-nominated album Homing and previews new material.

GOLDIE BOUTILIER.related_artists: King Princess, Lola Young, Baby Nova, Allie X, Slayyyter
GOLDIE BOUTILIER.summary: Canadian singer Goldie Boutilier makes a unique mix of alt-country, americana and pop noir, bringing her Hollywood glamour and 50s/60s hints to the Paarse zaal.

GOTU JIM.summary: Dutch rapper Gotu Jim, known for his viral hit 'Misschien (Kwijt)', blends house, trap, and emo in bittersweet songs as tonight's support act.

LOREENA MCKENNITT.summary: Canadian singer/musician Loreena McKennitt performs her unique blend of Celtic and Middle Eastern music live at Doornroosje.

KOVACS.related_artists: Betty Davis, Etta James, Tina Turner, Amy Winehouse, Shirley Bassey, Portishead, Till Lindemann
KOVACS.summary: Sharon Kovacs, a Dutch singer with a dark, soulful voice influenced by Betty Davis, Etta James, and others, performs her blend of folk, electronic, and pop noir on February 28th.

THE RASMUS.summary: The Rasmus is an iconic Finnish reggae band known for their hit 'In the Shadows' and their energetic live performances.
